slides.headline: Maximizing Support with Disability Services
slides.body: Collaborate with disability services to ensure comprehensive support for student veterans.

slides.headline: Check COE Remaining Entitlement
slides.body: Verify remaining COE entitlement before the student enrolls.

slides.headline: Log SAA Call in File
slides.body: Document SAA decision and contact details.

slides.headline: Verify SAP Plan
slides.body: Ensure SAP plan aligns with student needs.
bullets: Check for any missing or outdated information

slides.headline: Coordinate with MHA
slides.body: Collaborate with mental health authorities for support.

slides.headline: Implement Integrated Support
slides.body: Create a holistic plan for student success.
bullets: Incorporate COE, SAP, and MHA into the plan
Monitor progress and adjust as necessary

slides.body: Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Collaborate with disability services to ensure comprehensive support for student veterans. Check COE, log SAA calls, verify SAP, coordinate with MHA, and implement integrated support. Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro, link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1 of 5, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to capture attention.
